name: Dem-Con Materials Recovery Facility Virtual Tour

reviews.review_description: I shall download 1,4gig to see waste recovery? Come on!

developer_response.body: Sorry this experience wasn't for you. We love recycling and could watch these amazing machines all day!

reviews.review_description: I hate having a VR headset on and waiting for a video to download. Also this was interesting and free so thank you.

developer_response.body: You're welcome! We're glad you enjoyed it.

reviews.review_description:
1.4 gig is too much
but i enjoyed it

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind words! It is a large app to download. We wanted the videos to be viewable offline as the app is often used at community/educational events with unpredictable wifi.
